author.bio: tech leading @libp2p & @run_testground at @protocollabs | engineer: fixer of some things; breaker of many | PMC @TheASF | biohacker, stoic, hiker, dogs
author.name: Raúl Kripalani

content.text:
My team here at @protocollabs is phenomenal. Always up to the challenge, inquisitive, energetic, insightful.

Kudos to @nonsens3, Cory, Rob, @daviddias, @hacdias, @momack28, @jimpick, Stebalien, Dirk, Yusef, Vyzo, Adin.

Your work, dedication, and perseverance made this possible!
